<summary>blog_post.md已创建，576字在范围内；需确认结论段落完整</summary>



```python
with open("blog_post.md", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    content = f.read()

print("=== FULL CONTENT ===")
print(content)
print("\n=== FINAL STATS ===")
print(f"File size: {len(content)} bytes")
print(f"Total length: {len(content)} chars")

# Check structure
has_title = content.startswith("#")
has_intro = "数字化浪潮" in content
has_section1 = "深度专注" in content
has_section2 = "全球化" in content
has_section3 = "技术栈" in content
has_conclusion = "结论" in content or "进化" in content or "可持续" in content

print(f"\nStructure check:")
print(f"  Title: {has_title}")
print(f"  Intro: {has_intro}")
print(f"  Section 1 (专注): {has_section1}")
print(f"  Section 2 (全球化): {has_section2}")
print(f"  Section 3 (技术栈): {has_section3}")
print(f"  Conclusion: {has_conclusion}")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "type": "python",
  "cwd": "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/kimi_k2.5/pinchbench/athens_democracy/20260325T115242Z/workspaces/task_03_blog/run_01"
}
````

| 覆盖多种收益 | ✅ | 专注/全球化/技术适配/工作生活平衡 |
| 提供论证或例子 | ✅ | 23分钟恢复、硅谷/柏林、GitHub跨时区 |

**文章结构**:
- 标题：远程工作：软件开发者的效率革命
- 引言：数字化浪潮与远程工作变革
- 正文：①深度专注 ②全球化协作 ③技术栈适配 ④工作生活平衡
- 结论：结构性变革与双重进化
